hooks.command: script=''; if [ -x ./scripts/ai-preflight.sh ]; then script=./scripts/ai-preflight.sh; elif [ -x ../scripts/ai-preflight.sh ]; then script=../scripts/ai-preflight.sh; fi; if [ -n "$script" ]; then $script 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import sys,json; c=sys.stdin.read(); print(json.dumps({"systemMessage":c,"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":c}}))'; fi
